name: payments-stripe
summary: Stripe Checkout + billing portal (Server Actions) and a signature-verified webhook that writes the server-owned subscriptions table. Test-mode in dev.

env.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
env.note: Server-only. Use the TEST key (sk_test_...) in dev. NEVER NEXT_PUBLIC_.

env.name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
env.note: Server-only. From `stripe listen` (whsec_...) or the dashboard endpoint.

env.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL
env.note: Public base URL for checkout success/cancel redirects, e.g. http://localhost:3000.

postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_stripe_customers.sql (maps user <-> stripe customer; subscriptions table already exists from 0004)
Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET to src/core/env.ts and NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL to env.client.ts; mirror in .env.example
Local webhooks: `stripe listen --forward-to localhost:3000/api/stripe/webhook` and paste the whsec_ into STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
Create test-mode Products/Prices in the Stripe dashboard; pass the price id to startCheckout()
Replace src/features/billing/ui/paywall.tsx after the Claude Design pass
